title: Subquery
description: A structured subquery generated from decomposing a complex user request.

id.description: Unique identifier for the subquery, e.g., 'sq_1'.

text.description: The specific question or instruction for this subquery.

intent.description: The classified primary intent of the subquery.

priority.description: Execution priority (lower number = higher priority, e.g., 1 is highest).

schema_section.description: The generic topic area or schema property this focuses on.
